title: BEM-917 worker request
objective:
Create file governance/audit/mailbox/to_curator/BEM917_UNIFIED_PROTOCOL_TELEGRAM_GD_REPORTS_REQUEST.md with content # BEM-917 UNIFIED PROTOCOL TELEGRAM GD REPORTS REQUEST
Status: SENT_TO_CURATOR
Route: External GPT auditor -> Curator -> Worker -> Curator -> external mailbox
Objective: update BEM-916 unified system improvement protocol with operator remarks about Telegram interaction.
Operator remarks:
1. Telegram must be configured to the General Director, not an undefined curator.
2. Reports must be delivered with operator-selected periodicity. Default is 1 hour. Operator may later change default period.
3. Telegram reports must follow the reporting canon.
Required protocol changes:
- In Telegram Operator Interface section, define default Telegram target object as General Director OBJ-GD-001 via General Director Curator EL-CUR-GD-001.
- Incoming operator Telegram messages enter the system at General Director level, then GD Curator routes to Director or Worker according to policy gate and task class.
- Outgoing Telegram reports are signed by the relevant level but delivered through the General Director channel:
  Curator operational report -> Director aggregation -> General Director delivery to operator.
- Add operator-configurable report periodicity state: default 1 hour, configurable by operator through /report_interval or /settings.
- Schedule trigger remains operator-gated. Protocol must distinguish report interval setting from enabling actual schedule automation.
- Add canonical Telegram report template:
  BEM-<N> | <title> | YYYY-MM-DD | HH:MM (UTC+3)
  Stage: X/Y (Z%)
  Roadmap: X/Y (Z%)
  Checklist: ✅/⚠️/❌ with proof paths
  Table: name, description, rationale
  Next action: one concrete step or explicit operator gate.
- Add acceptance criteria and E2E selftest: parse /task, parse /status, parse /report_interval 1h, generate canonical report, route via OBJ-GD-001.
Worker must confirm coherence and executable scope.
Expected status: APPROVED_WITH_NOTES or BLOCKED_WITH_REASON.
No issue comments.
